sections.description: Astro components for progress tracking, search, and continue-reading UI.
sections.purpose: Client-side interactive components that enhance the static tutorial pages with localStorage-based progress tracking.
sections.functionality: ProgressBar.astro: injects checkboxes on step headings (h3 or h2 fallback), tracks completion in localStorage, stores version fingerprint for reconciliation, updates progress bar and milestone indicators. SeriesProgress.astro: reads all tutorial progress for a series, shows two stacked bars (tutorials complete + current tutorial steps), continue button with bookmark hash. ContinueReading.astro: home page cards for in-progress series and standalone tutorials, two-bar layout for series, dismiss button with auto-clear on new progress. Search.astro: Pagefind UI integration.
sections.dependencies: No npm dependencies — all vanilla JS using localStorage API and DOM manipulation.
sections.strengths: Zero-dependency client-side progress. Automatic version reconciliation when tutorials change. Dismiss state auto-clears on new progress.
sections.weaknesses: localStorage only — no cross-device sync. Step detection relies on heading structure conventions.
sections.test_coverage: No automated tests. Manually verified in browser.
